title: Improve atomicity of VM state persistence on Windows
body:
Fixes #16550 - Podman machine won't start due to corrupted config file

```release-note
Improve atomicity of VM state persistence on Windows to better tolerate FS corruption in cases of power loss or system failure.
```

This change uses a write + rename approach. Os.Rename() on windows maps to MoveFileEx with MOVEFILE_REPLACE_EXISTING, which is a journaled metadata update (ZwSetInformationFile) on NTFS, so atomic.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]
